Projects

A selection of things I've built, shipped, and learned from.

Readwise CLI

A command-line tool for browsing and exporting your Readwise highlights, with fuzzy search and Markdown export.

go cli open-source

This Website

My personal site, built with Jekyll. Minimal design with dark mode support, zero JavaScript dependencies.

jekyll css design

TinyTask

A minimal task manager that lives in your terminal. No database, no cloud sync — just a plain-text file you own.

typescript cli productivity
